scripts.check:js: node --check src/scripts/main.js && node --check src/scripts/navigation.js && node --check src/scripts/projects.js && node --check src/scripts/modals.js && node --check src/scripts/motion.js && node --check src/data/projects.js && node --check scripts/build-static.mjs && node --check scripts/check-budgets.mjs
scripts.test:cypress: npm run build && node tests/support/run-with-server.mjs 4174 cypress run --config baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:4174
scripts.test:robot: npm run build && node tests/support/run-with-server.mjs 4177 robot --outputdir test-results/robot --variable BASE_URL:http://127.0.0.1:4177 tests/robot/site.robot
scripts.test:all: npm run check:js && npm run test:budget && npm run test:playwright && npm run test:cypress && npm run test:selenium && npm run test:robot
